LanguageData.Apparel_DO_ClothOne.label: draconic commonwear
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_ClothOne.description: Everyday clothing tailored for Dracaena bodies. It serves as their baseline garment and can be made from ordinary fabrics.
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_Artist.label: artist attire
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_Artist.description: A decorated overgarment worn by Dracaena artisans. Its balanced cut favors comfort, expression, and long hours at the worktable.
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_ArtistHat.label: artist cap
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_ArtistHat.description: A soft cap favored by Dracaena painters and sculptors. It is light to wear and lends a little extra presence in conversation.
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_BlackSmith.label: smithwork attire
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_BlackSmith.description: A reinforced Dracaena smith's outfit meant for hot forges and long production shifts. It trades some comfort for utility and toughness.
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_Farmer.label: fieldwear
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_Farmer.description: A broad-cut work outfit for marsh fields and grain handling. It keeps a Dracaena mobile while improving the pace of sowing and harvest work.
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_StrawHat.label: straw hat
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_StrawHat.description: A wide straw hat woven for farm work under harsh sun. Dracaena growers favor it for long days in exposed fields.
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_LeatherArmor.label: leather armor
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_LeatherArmor.description: Layered leather protection cut to fit a Dracaena frame. It is light enough for travel, but sturdier than ordinary clothing.
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_PaddedArmor.label: padded armor
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_PaddedArmor.description: A padded defense coat stitched for Dracaena militia. It cannot match solid metal, but it softens lighter blows without excessive weight.
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_HeadArmor.label: draconic crested helmet
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_HeadArmor.description: A forged helmet built for the shape of a Dracaena skull. The crest helps it remain visually distinct on the battlefield.
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_GaleaAttica.label: Attican galea
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_GaleaAttica.description: A light military galea with cheek protection and improved brow reinforcement. It is a disciplined upgrade over the basic crested helmet.
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_GaleaLegionarii.label: legionary galea
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_GaleaLegionarii.description: A sealed combat helmet with modern internals and a classical silhouette. Legionaries wear it when lighter spacer armor is required.
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_GaleaCentunarii.label: centurion galea
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_GaleaCentunarii.description: A heavily plated command helmet built to break the line alongside elite Dracaena shock troops.
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_LoricaHamataOne.label: lorica hamata I
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_LoricaHamataOne.description: A mail-based torso defense patterned after old Dracaena military kit. It offers dependable all-round protection without the cost of powered armor.
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_LoricaHamataTwo.label: lorica hamata II
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_LoricaHamataTwo.description: An improved hamata harness with denser mail and reinforced joints. It is heavier than the first pattern, but markedly more secure.
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_LoricaHamataGravita.label: gravita hamata
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_LoricaHamataGravita.descripti: A powered mail-shell hybrid that keeps the traditional hamata profile while using spacer materials to absorb punishment far beyond conventional armor.
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_LoricaSquamataOne.label: lorica squamata I
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_LoricaSquamataOne.description: A scale-pattern body harness that favors agility over raw mass. It is easier to move in than heavy mail, but still meant for the front line.
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_LoricaSquamataTwo.label: lorica squamata II
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_LoricaSquamataTwo.description: An upgraded scale harness with denser lamination and improved shoulder coverage. It keeps more mobility than mail while offering better protection than the first pattern.
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_LoricaSquamataGravita.label: gravita squamata
LanguageData.Apparel_DO_LoricaSquamataGravita.descrip: A light powered scale suit optimized for scouting and fast attack. It offers spacer-grade protection while preserving more speed than the heavier gravita hamata.
